subject: good job on increasing your participation in crude trading

emails.subject: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.subject_base: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.body: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading You really should take a sabbatical from COO and just come and run the whole thing. Clearly you are the only one who understands the nuts and bolts of trade till liquidation.

emails.subject: RE: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.subject_base: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.body: RE: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading thanks for the vote. To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.subject_base: Good Job On Increasing Your Participation in Crude Trading
emails.body: I also told Mike Mcconnell the same thing in Cabo. I talked to him by the pool on Saturday afternoon. I said it will take your full-time efforts to fix the place. To: Fraser, Jennifer
